case_title: AMERICAN EXPRESS CENTURION BANK VS. RUTVIJ PATEL et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE: VENUE FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS CENTURION BANK
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF NOV-28-2011 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS CENTURION BANK AS TO DEFENDANT PATEL, RUTVIJ AN INDIVIDUAL DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  OCT-11-2011
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR NOV-28-2011 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 2:00 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
